expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses this: "Requirement 1 (blocking): Developer smoke checklist is derived from **P1** and **[ANALOG-GATE]** scenarios" and further states the implementation "extracting checklist rows where scenario lines contain either: <P1> or [ANALOG-GATE]".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
